datasets.name: disruptions_by_line
datasets.query: SELECT line_name, SUM(affected_customers) AS total_affected_customers, COUNT(*) AS disruption_events FROM gold.tfl.disruption_summary GROUP BY line_name ORDER BY total_affected_customers DESC

datasets.name: daily_customer_impact
datasets.query: SELECT disruption_date, SUM(affected_customers) AS affected_customers, COUNT(DISTINCT line_id) AS lines_disrupted FROM gold.tfl.disruption_summary GROUP BY disruption_date ORDER BY disruption_date

datasets.name: severity_distribution
datasets.query: SELECT status_severity_description, SUM(affected_customers) AS affected_customers FROM gold.tfl.disruption_summary GROUP BY status_severity_description ORDER BY affected_customers DESC

datasets.name: customers_to_alert
datasets.query: SELECT line_name, line_id, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customers_to_alert, disruption_reason FROM gold.tfl.notification_targets GROUP BY line_name, line_id, disruption_reason ORDER BY customers_to_alert DESC

datasets.name: affected_stations
datasets.query: SELECT home_station, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS affected_customers, COUNT(DISTINCT line_id) AS disrupted_lines FROM gold.tfl.notification_targets GROUP BY home_station ORDER BY affected_customers DESC LIMIT 20
